headline: ON Semiconductor Corporation (ON) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
summary: Recently, Zacks.com users have been paying close attention to ON Semiconductor Corp. (ON). This makes it worthwhile to examine what the stock has in store.

headline: Nvidia Leads Chip Stock Rebound, Billionaire Investor Buys 1 Million Shares To Defy AI 'Bubble' Fears
summary: Semiconductor stocks like Nvidia (NVDA) and AMD are bouncing back Wednesday. Discover why billionaire Leo KoGuan is doubling down on AI with a massive share purchase and why experts say the recent sell-off was a "nervous market" overreaction.
